scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:css && pnpm run build:js && pnpm run build:eleventy
scripts.dev: concurrently -n toolkit,css,js,eleventy -c magenta,blue,yellow,green "pnpm --filter @ourfuturehealth/toolkit watch" "pnpm watch:css" "pnpm watch:js" "pnpm watch:eleventy"
scripts.watch: concurrently -n toolkit,css,js,eleventy -c magenta,blue,yellow,green "pnpm --filter @ourfuturehealth/toolkit watch" "pnpm watch:css" "pnpm watch:js" "pnpm watch:eleventy"
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:html && pnpm run lint:css
